judgment.summary: Salesforce exhibits strong growth and profitability with a reasonable forward valuation, despite a high debt load.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 24.9%; next earnings date is 2026-05-27.
positives: Revenue growth 12.1% YoY and earnings growth 17.9% YoY indicate robust expansion.
Profit margin 18.0% and operating margin 19.2% demonstrate strong profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $16.37B is substantial.
Forward P/E of 11.75x and PEG ratio of 0.98 suggest the stock is attractively valued relative to its growth.
Analyst consensus is a strong buy with a mean target of $265.01.
negatives: Total debt of $17.71B is significantly higher than total cash of $9.56B, leading to a high Debt/Equity ratio of 29.95%.
Current ratio of 0.76 and quick ratio of 0.64 indicate potential short-term liquidity concerns.
Beta of 1.14 suggests higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Salesforce (CRM) has no recent headlines to inform an options trade. The company is set to report earnings on May 27th, which will be the next catalyst for price movement. Traders should consider the upcoming earnings report and the current analyst sentiment when evaluating positions.

examples.body: $CRM added 1% of a portfolio position. Small not to hurt much, enough to generate some income.
